guardrails.note: Read-only continuous wave planner for human review. It does not modify article status, noindex, review, or publishing state.
guardrails.stopBefore: Each wave still requires explicit human approval before mark:review --confirm-human or publish:articles --confirm.

laneMapGuardrails.note: Read-only search-intent lane map. Demand scores are editorial prioritization signals from broad query patterns and source review needs, not keyword-volume or traffic data.

approvalGuardrails.note: Read-only human approval packet derived from the search-intent lane map. It does not change article status, noindex, or publishing state.
approvalGuardrails.stopBefore: Run confirm-human or publish confirm commands only after explicit human approval for each file.

sourceEvidence.note: The planner uses editorial lane priorities and safe draft evidence only. It does not claim measured keyword volume, impressions, clicks, or traffic.

approvalChecks: Human review flag is present: true
Reviewer verifies official sources before any status change.
Reviewer confirms the article answers one broad search intent without unsupported traffic or income claims.
